title: Atomic dimension landing
summary: Five new HLK governance dimensions land in a single P1 commit; no partial / sequential rollout.

title: Two-layer SSOT (markdown for prose, CSV for metadata)

title: REPOSITORY_REGISTRY promotion path

title: Status taxonomy ownership at akos.planning.status_taxonomy

title: DECISION_REGISTER inclusion in I59
summary: Folded into I59 (vs I60 deferral) so initiative_registry's *_decision_id fields can be real FKs from day one.

title: Nullable FKs (manifests_processes, coordinated_initiative_ids)
summary: Empty is explicit and fine; wrong is not. Validators FK-resolve when set, allow empty.

title: manifests_processes column on INITIATIVE_REGISTRY (vs inverse)
summary: FK lives on the initiative side as a semicolon-list to process_list.csv; reverse-lookup via mirror queries.

title: Header-only seed for INITIATIVE/OPS/CYCLE/DECISION in P1; bulk seed in P3

title: OPS-58-3 rubric calibration fix lands in I59 P6 (not deferred to I60)

title: Telemetry promotion routine runs once in I59 P7 (in operator's stead)
summary: Auto-merge forbidden per I49 P11 / I50 P5; agent runs the proposal pass and operator merges at next sitting.

title: Process_list mints deferred to I60 candidate

title: process_list mint authority chain: SOP-META + role_owner + tranche operator approval
